payload.title: Eastern Parkway - Transit Priority Proposal B14 from Schenectady Avenue to Ralph Avenue
payload.publisher: New York City Department of Transportation (NYC DOT)
payload.description: Draft proposal presented to Brooklyn Community Board 8 for transit priority improvements on Eastern Parkway from Schenectady Avenue to Ralph Avenue, including B14 bus stop relocations, ADA accessibility improvements, and pedestrian mall treatments.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

Bus route operating along Eastern Parkway between Schenectady Avenue and Ralph Avenue. Subject of transit priority proposal.

tool_args.label: Eastern Parkway from Schenectady Avenue to Ralph Avenue

payload.limits: from Schenectady Avenue to Ralph Avenue
payload.description: Segment of Eastern Parkway in Brooklyn where transit priority improvements are proposed for the B14 bus route.

tool_args.label: Eastern Parkway Transit Priority Proposal B14

payload.project_name: Eastern Parkway - Transit Priority Proposal B14 from Schenectady Avenue to Ralph Avenue
payload.description: Proposal to relocate B14 bus stops to southern pedestrian malls, install ADA ramps, replace landscaping with pavers, remove Rochester Avenue bus stop, and retain eastbound right turn bays at Buffalo Avenue and Ralph Avenue.

tool_args.label: Relocate B14 bus stops to southern pedestrian malls

payload.description: Relocate B14 bus stops to the southern pedestrian malls along Eastern Parkway from Schenectady Avenue to Ralph Avenue.
payload.locations: Eastern Parkway southern pedestrian malls, from Schenectady Avenue to Ralph Avenue

locations_normalized.raw_text: Eastern Parkway southern pedestrian malls, from Schenectady Avenue to Ralph Avenue

tool_args.label: Install ADA ramps connecting northern pedestrian malls

payload.description: Install ADA ramps connecting northern pedestrian malls along Eastern Parkway.

tool_args.label: Replace landscaping with hexagon or smooth granite pavers

payload.description: Replace current landscaping with hexagon pavers or smooth granite pavers to make bus stops accessible.

tool_args.label: Remove B14 bus stop at Rochester Avenue

payload.description: Proposed removal of the B14 bus stops at Rochester Avenue for bus stop balancing to increase bus speeds and travel time.

tool_args.label: Retain eastbound right turn bays at Buffalo Avenue and Ralph Avenue

payload.description: Retain existing eastbound right turn bays at Buffalo Avenue and Ralph Avenue.

tool_args.label: Transplant young tree at South Mall east of Buffalo Avenue

payload.description: Coordinating with Parks Department to transplant a young tree to create a bus stop to serve passengers at South Mall east of Buffalo Avenue.
payload.locations: Eastern Parkway South Mall, east of Buffalo Avenue

locations_normalized.raw_text: Eastern Parkway South Mall, east of Buffalo Avenue
